# terrible_community_general_github_key (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) SSH key name.
- `token` (String) GitHub Access Token with permission to list and create public keys.

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) URL to the GitHub API if not using github.com but your own GitHub Enterprise instance.
- `force` (Boolean) The default is `true`, which replaces the existing remote key if it is different than `pubkey`. If `false`, the key is only set if no key with the given `name` exists.
- `pubkey` (String) SSH public key value. Required when `state=present`.
- `state` (String) Whether to remove a key, ensure that it exists, or update its value.

### Read-Only

- `deleted_keys` (String) An array of key objects that were deleted. Only present on state=absent.
- `key` (String) Metadata about the key just created. Only present on state=present.
- `matching_keys` (String) An array of keys matching the specified name. Only present on state=present.
